title: A Very 1999 Christmas Music Discs (1.21.5-1.21.11)
description: (Updated Fork) Adds jschlatt's Christmas album "A Very 1999 Christmas (Deluxe)" to the game.
body:
# 🎄 jschlatt's A Very 1999 Christmas (Deluxe)

Adds the 8 tracks from jschlatt's "A Very 1999 Christmas" album to Minecraft as music discs.

> 🎁 **NEW: Deluxe Edition Update!** Now includes all tracks from the expanded album release.

---

## ✨ Features

- **11 Christmas music discs** from jschlatt's album
- **Craftable album bundle** using disc fragments and an end crystal
- **Resource pack + datapack/mod** combo for full functionality
- **Give command** for creative/admin use

---

## 🎁 How to Obtain

### Crafting Recipe
Combine 8 disc fragments around 1 end crystal:

![An image of the crafting recipe. Shows a crafting table with 8 disc fragments arranged around an end crystal in the center.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2425907a977852d4c6e3f2f13dfa7356c0c2fdac.png)

### Command
Use `/function jschlattchristmas:give` to give yourself the album (requires cheats).

---

## 🎵 Track List

### Original Album (8 tracks)
- Santa Claus Is Coming To Town
- The Christmas Song
- Let It Snow! Let It Snow! Let It Snow!
- Happy Holiday
- Baby It's Cold Outside
- White Christmas
- It's The Most Wonderful Time Of The Year
- Have Yourself A Merry Little Christmas

### 🆕 Deluxe Edition Additions
- Sleigh Ride
- Mele Kalikimaka
- (Everybody's Waitin' For) The Man With The Bag

[Listen to the deluxe album on YouTube](https://youtu.be/0l_GFQvISEM)

---

## 📋 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.5+
- **Both** the resource pack and datapack/mod are required

---
